steps.explanation: This is an uppercase (capital) letter D. Uppercase letters are the big versions of letters.

steps.instruction: Every uppercase letter has a lowercase partner. What is the lowercase version of D?
steps.explanation: The lowercase version of D is d. They look different but they are the same letter and have the same name.

steps.instruction: Both D and d have the same name.
steps.work: D and d are both called 'dee'
steps.explanation: Whether a letter is uppercase or lowercase, it has the same name. This letter is called 'dee'.

title: Finding a Letter in a Word

steps.explanation: This word has three letters. We can name each one.
The first letter is s. Its name is 'ess'.

steps.instruction: Now name all three letters in order.
steps.explanation: The word 'sun' is spelled with three letters: ess, you, en. Knowing letter names helps us talk about words and spell them.
